changes: Added conditional branch in Status command handler (lines 503-507)
Preserved existing print_status_summary() as default behavior when watch flag is false
file_insights.flag_usage: watch: bool parameter from CLI args struct

patterns_discovered.description: Using boolean flags to conditionally invoke different async functions within same command handler
patterns_discovered.reusability: high - can extend to other flag-driven branching in Status or other commands

patterns_discovered.pattern: Hardcoded filter string in watch mode
patterns_discovered.description: Watch mode always uses "active" as the filter argument to list_cards_watch
patterns_discovered.precedent: Similar to how other commands invoke list_cards_watch with specific filters

patterns_discovered.pattern: Empty ID check gates watch behavior
patterns_discovered.description: Watch mode only triggers when id.trim().is_empty(), preventing watch from running on specific card IDs
patterns_discovered.logic_flow: Status with no ID + watch flag = watch mode; Status with ID + watch flag = single card handling (unchanged)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Watch mode unavailable for single-card status
gotchas_discovered.context: The conditional is inside if id.trim().is_empty() block, so --watch only works when listing all cards, not specific IDs
gotchas_discovered.potential_issue: User expecting `bop status <id> --watch` to work will get single-card status instead
gotchas_discovered.severity: medium - may need documentation or UX clarification

gotchas_discovered.context: list_cards_watch called with hardcoded "active" string; no way to filter by other states in watch mode
gotchas_discovered.design_implication: Watch mode shows only active cards; other states require separate invocation
gotchas_discovered.severity: low - matches existing bop behavior but limits flexibility

gotchas_discovered.context: Relies on list_cards_watch error propagation (`.await?`); changes are structurally safe
gotchas_discovered.severity: low - existing error handling is sufficient

approach_outcome.implementation_quality: clean - minimal diff, clear intent, no refactoring needed
approach_outcome.async_safety: correct - await placed on async function call within async context

recommendations.rationale: Currently --watch is only effective for full status listing; single-card watch would enable focused monitoring of specific card
recommendations.implementation_hint: Move watch branch outside the id.trim().is_empty() check, add new code path for watched single cards

recommendations.suggestion: Document --watch flag behavior (shows active cards only, requires no ID argument)
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation behavior is non-obvious from flag name alone

recommendations.suggestion: Add integration test for `bop status --watch` invocation
recommendations.rationale: Verify watch mode properly invokes list_cards_watch and gracefully handles terminal interrupt
recommendations.test_location: crates/bop-cli/tests/ or existing status command tests

recommendations.rationale: May enable future extensibility if other filters become useful in watch mode
